narrative:
Precinct Liberty B (precinct in Seneca County) has 419 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 16.5 percentage points.
